_publications._publicationTitle: Suppression of proliferation of two independent NF1 malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cell lines by the pan-ErbB inhibitor CI-1033.

_contextSnippet: did not effectively suppress proliferation of the non-NF1 STS-26T line at concentrations below 10 μM
details: Did not effectively respond to gefitinib at concentrations below 10 μM and was significantly less sensitive to CI-1033 inhibition
